# svelte-sileo

Svelte-Sileo is a toast library for Svelte 5.

It provides gooey SVG morphing, spring-driven motion, promise toasts, inline action buttons, single or multiple toast modes, and support for custom Svelte components inside the toast body.

Primary website: https://svelte-sileo.alexisgvrcia.dev/
Repository: https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/svelte-sileo
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/svelte-sileo

Install:
npm install svelte-sileo

Quick start:
- Render one Toaster component near the root of the app.
- Import the sileo API where you need to trigger notifications.
- Use sileo.success, sileo.error, sileo.warning, sileo.info, sileo.action, or sileo.promise.

Key behavior:
- Single mode replaces the current toast by default.
- Multiple mode stacks toasts.
- Passing a stable id updates a toast in place.
- description can be text or a Svelte component.
- duration: null keeps a toast visible.

Recommended links:
- Home and examples: https://svelte-sileo.alexisgvrcia.dev/
- Documentation summary in repo: https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/svelte-sileo/blob/main/LLM.md
